full_text:
Sun Xia
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Xiawas born in Nanyang. Last Turban leader at Wan, defeated by Zhu Jun and chased to Jing Hills in Xi’e. Sun Xia was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Sun Xia lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
